subcodes.first_line: O Mahmud! Praise thou thy Lord and be praiseworthy in His Cause, that all things may bear witness to thy turning unto God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا محمود ان احمد ربک و کن محمودا فی امره لیشهد کلشیء علی اقبالک الی الله
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @rejection, opposition and persecution
